target_event: 2012–2013 escalation of the Syrian civil war
event_summary: The 2012–2013 escalation of the Syrian civil war refers to the third phase of the Syrian civil war, which gradually escalated from a UN-mediated cease fire attempt during April–May 2012 and deteriorated into radical violence, escalating the conflict level to a full-fledged civil war.
